abilities.ability_description: Target an ally for a bouncing stream of healing energy, which also heals himself upon casting; self-targets if no ally is selected
Gather quantum energy into a cluster and then swiftly launch it at the enemy

Storm channels her elemental power into Adam Warlock. When Adam uses Soaring Surge, his movement speed is increased. While flying, Adam leaves behind a storm-charged trail that heals and speeds up allies within it
Take to the skies, entering a flying state and swiftly surge forward
Launch quantum energy to deal damage
Once his body perishes, Adam Warlock can freely move as a soul and reforge his body at a chosen spot
Forge a soul bond with allies, granting Healing Over Time and distributing damage taken across the bond
Enter an accelerated dash state,  enemies struck head-on are carried through the air for a short distance
Alternate powerful strikes forward with twin axes, dealing increased damage as Attack Charge grows. The fourth strike propels you forward in a swift dash

Angela shares fragments of her Ichors with Thor, empowering him to hurl a Thunder Spear that restores Thorforce for each enemy struck. Afterward, Thor can leap to the spear's explosion point, dealing a second wave of damage to all enemies within range

Dive downward, switch to twin axes and infuse the ground with Ichors to create a Divine Judgement Zone upon impact. Within the zone, gain enhanced Speed and attacks grant Bonus Health to self and nearby allies

Wrap your spear in ribbons and hurl it with force. Upon impact, the ribbons bind nearby enemies. Angela can leap to the spear's location, damaging surrounding enemies and creating a Divine Judgement Zone
Transform Ichors into a shield, gaining Attack Charge when absorbing damage
Glide freely through the air. Continuous flight builds Attack Charge
Lunge forward with your spear, dealing damage that increases with Attack Charge. At full charge, Spear of Ichor can launch up enemies
Take to the skies, switching back to Spear of Ichors
Issue a Calling Card to all enemies. Instantly dash to any enemy in sight and range, tearing into them with your claws to deal Percentage Damage
Lunge forward with claws bared, slicing through any enemies caught in your path
Purify yourself, instantly removing any active control effects
Fire out tethered claws and whip them forward in a devastating arc, dealing damage to all enemies caught in range
Conjure an orb of mystical Faltine Flame to Revealand mark all nearby enemies
Swipe forward with razor-sharp claws
Spend Fortuneto unleash either Grapple Swipeor Phantom Pursuit

Black Cat shares items acquired from Insider Trading with White Fox and Captain America. White Fox receives the Life Orb, which restores Spirit Fox Tail energy and converts life energy into Nine-Tailed Radiance that auto-tracks nearby allies and enemies, granting allies speed and healing while dealing damage and slowing enemies. Captain America receives the Vibranium Energy Amplifier, which expands shield block range when raised and reflects projectiles back along the crosshair direction.
Use the Spatial Resonator to open a portal to the Elder Gods' dimension, consuming Fortune to trade with the Golden Elder and acquire items from the New York Thieves Guild vault.
Enter Invisiblestate for a set duration
Apply Jinxto enemies on hit. Jinxedfoes have a chance to lose their bonus damage when striking Black Cat with a Critical Hit
Create a hypnosis field. Inflicts Slow, disables movement abilities, and Groundsall enemies caught within
Swiftly dash to an enemy, unleash a rapid flurry of claw attacks, and flash back to your starting position. Black Cat is Untargetableduring this move
Open a portal on a surface, allowing instant traversal to the opposite side
Hold {Jump} to crawl up vertical surfaces
Steal a set amount of Fortunewhenever your attacks hit an enemy
Gain a random amount of Fortune
Perform a double jump
Launch a grappling hook forward that damages an enemy on impact and steals Fortunebefore pulling it back to Black Cat
Summon Bast, pouncing forward, dealing damage, and attaching a Vibranium Mark to enemies hit while refreshing Spirit Rend

Hulk charges Namor and Black Panther with gamma radiation. Namor can summon an extra Gamma Monstro which will continuously fire gamma rays at locked-on enemies. The longer the rays hit, the higher the damage. Black Panther's Vibranium armor is enhanced; when his health is low he receives a gamma shield, blocking incoming attacks and becoming Unstoppable
Deal higher damage when at low Health
Toss a Vibranium energy spear forward, creating a Vibranium Force Field and attaching a Vibranium Mark to enemies in its radius
Spiral forward and attach a Vibranium Mark to enemies hit
Lunge forward and deal damage to enemies. Vibranium Mark produces Bonus Health and refreshes the ability
Hold Space to run on a wall; perform a jump after detaching from the wall
Slice Vibranium Claws forward
Unleash a spinning kick to Knock enemies airborne. Landing the hit will allow her to zip to the target with a grappling hook for a second kick
Switch the Red Room Rifle to Destruction mode and unleash an electro-plasma blast, damaging enemies within range and leaving plasma on the ground to Slow nearby enemies
Dash forward and enable a powerful jump

Jean Grey imbues Wolverine and Black Widow with the awe-inspiring Phoenix Force. When active, Wolverine's Feral Leap transforms into Phoenix Warrior, gaining lifesteal on all damage dealt and enveloping him with Phoenix flames that scorch nearby enemies, dealing Percentage Damage. Black Widow gains Phoenix Force-empowered bullets; her Phoenix Rounds explode on impact and heal allies in the blast radius
Attack with the Red Room Rifle
Switch the Red Room Rifle to Sniper mode to fire high-energy rounds
Strike with the enhanced electric batons
Slash forward with Blade's Ancestral Sword

Awaken the Dhampir bloodline, enhancing slash speed during continuous attacks and triggering Whirlwind Slash.If all Whirlwind Slash strikes hit, your Attack Speed will further increase. While under this state, you suffer Reduced Healing, but attacks gain Lifesteal
Dash forward. If wielding your gun, shoot at enemies upon impact, applying a Healing Reduction effect. If wielding your sword, deliver a cleaving strike that inflicts Slow

Blessed by Khonshu, Blade gains a new ability. When activated, Blade swings his Ancestral Sword in a powerful slash, dashing forward a short distance. At the end of the dash, he swiftly slashes four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets
Fire at enemies using your Shotgun
Parry with Ancestral Sword to become Unstoppable for a brief period, reducing damage taken from the front and decreasing the cooldown of Daywalker Dash

Charge power and swiftly draw the Sword of Dracula, executing a powerful Iaido strike as you dash forward, leaving behind a slashing zone where the sword automatically strikes enemies. Enemies hit suffer Reduced Healing

Inspired by Captain America's resolve, Winter Soldier can leap to the aid of a designated ally, slamming the ground with his mechanical arm to deal damage to nearby foes. Additionally, Captain America and Winter Soldier can interact with each other once both parties confirm. The duo collides and unleashes a shockwave that deals damage and inflicts slow on enemies

Shield held high, carve a path forward, granting both himself and allies along the path continuous Bonus Health and Movement Boosts. Allies also gain Ultimate Ability Charge Acceleration. Using Living Legend and Leading Dash while this ability is active can Launch Up enemies
Boost speed and enable Fearless Leap to leap into the air
Raise the shield and charge forward
Raise the shield to deflect incoming projectiles, sending them ricocheting in random directions
Get up close to strike enemies. Landing the second hit enables a shield throw that can ricochet four times
Slam down from the sky onto the targeted area, Launching Up enemies

Black Cat shares her luck with her allies. When White Fox embraces her newfound fortune, she unleashestracking Spirit Tails to grant Healing and Speed to allies, while damaging and Slowing foes. When Captain America enjoys his luck, his shield's block radius expands and allows him to aim deflectedProjectiles directly toward his target
Hurl the energy-charged shield to strike enemies in a path
Launch a volley of daggers, creating a Healing Over Time field in the impact area
Enshroud nearby allies in the Darkforce Dimension, plunging them into the Phased state, making them untargetable and invisible to enemies and granting them a Movement Boost
Inflict continuous damage on an enemy
Perform four rapid dashes, healing allies and damaging enemies along the path

Cloak & Dagger inject light and dark energy into Hawkeye's katana. When Hawkeye uses Crescent Slash, enemies hit are launched back, and a blade wave filled with light and energy sweeps forward. This wave passes through both allies and enemies: it heals and boosts healing for allies, while damaging enemies and applying Vulnerability
Switch to Dagger
Unleash a bouncing Lightforce Dagger to damage enemies and heal nearby allies
Switch to Cloak
Deploy a Veil of Darkforce to damage enemies upon touch, applying Blind to narrow their sight and Vulnerability to amplify damage received
Deploy a Veil of Lightforce to heal allies upon touch and grant them a Healing Boost
Continuously fire a powerful beam that can refract between enemies and the environment. Hitting enemies accelerates Ricochet Force charge rate
Enter a slow-fall state while firing Concussive Beam mid-air
Fire a propulsion beam directly downward to push yourself up and knock back hit enemies, applying a Slow effect to them
Fire a quick burst of kinetic force forward. Hitting enemies accelerates Ricochet Force charge rate
Fire a propulsion beam to push yourself and the target backward, applying a Slow effect to the enemy

Cyclops supercharges Wolverine's claws, extending his attack range. While active, Wolverine's Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting him a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around him
Fire a beam that can diffract and track nearby enemies after hitting terrain. Upon use, Cyclops gains Bonus Health
Remove visor and fire a powerful sweeping beam forward. The blast leaves behind volatile excess energy that erupts, dealing massive secondary explosive damage
Plushie power! It stops every single attack those chumps throw, giving my team a safety bubble. It's cute AND bulletproof

My ultra-cool, super shiny, extra huggable, and totally blinged-out plushy. Toss it ahead, and it lands as an invincible sphere of awesomeness! Blocking attacks and keeping my team safe inside our furry fortress
Yup, I can double jump in midair! During The Big Test and its upgrade, I can also stomp heads and wall jump to reset its cooldown. Stomp enemies so hard they won't get near my team!

Hippity-hoppity, Deadpool's on your property! Watch me squeeze in a second jump midair! Hop on heads or kick off walls with Bunny Hop to refresh the cooldown, and if I land on someone? Free health for me, and a headache for them. Whee!

Deadpool hands Jeff the Land Shark a plushie with attitude. Jeff can spit it ahead where it'll continuously Taunt nearby enemies and Block Vision, while allies in range enjoy a plush-powered healing party!
True heroes taunt face-to-face! I roast nearby baddies, mess up their vision, and tank their hits like a boss. Try me!

abilities.ability_name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - DUELIST UPGRADED
abilities.ability_description: Check out the best trash talk in the Chronoverse! Keep taunting and melting their HP! I even block their screen, so they can't see squat. Plus, I tank hits like a champ. Enemies that stick around too long get the bottom of their screen taped up. By the end, they won't even find their health bar and whatnot. Good luck fighting what you can't see, suckers!
Want to hurt my team? Good luck! I hit you with a taunt, mess up your vision, and burn your health nonstop! Best part: my swords and guns go full turbo for the duration. Blink and you'll miss it

abilities.ability_name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - STRATEGIST UPGRADED
abilities.ability_description: Teammates, stay safe! Dummies, look here! It's showtime: I taunt, blind you, and hit warp speed with my swords and guns. Plus, my crew gets a damage reduction buff, so they're basically invincible. Dummies that stick around too long will even have their UI taped over!
Want to hurt my team? Good luck! I hit you with a taunt, mess up your vision, and burn your health nonstop! Best part: my swords and guns go full turbo for the duration. Blink and you'll miss it

abilities.ability_name: DEADPOOL IN YOUR AREA - VANGUARD UPGRADED
abilities.ability_description: Teammates, stay safe! Dummies, look here! It's showtime: I taunt, blind you, and hit warp speed with my swords and guns. Plus, my crew gets a damage reduction buff, so they're basically invincible. Dummies that stick around too long will even have their UI taped over!
Bang! Bang! Unleash two hand cannons left and right, because one gun is never enough. Pew pew, baby!
Keep blasting till you trigger a BOOM. My thoughts literally explode onto the battlefield. Talk about mind-blowing firepower!
Nobody lays a finger on my teammates! Anyone tries, and I'm firing these big boy bullets straight at their face!
I rack up shots, then, BOOM! A mind-blowing bubble bomb for all the enemies. Teammate security: maximum
Nobody lays a finger on my teammates! Anyone tries, and I'm firing these big boy bullets straight at their face!
I rack up shots, then, BOOM! A mind-blowing bubble bomb for all the enemies. Teammate security: maximum

Wake the #!&% up, hero! We've got a game to win! Speed and healing buffs for starters, bonus Healing Hijinks for me, and extra HP for me and my nearby friends. Hit enough baddies with the right abilities exactly as I ask, and you unlock mega speed and healing, plus reset my Healing Factor cooldown!. Team protection mode: activated!

Hey, player! Warm-up's over, time for the main event! Speed, healing, dashes, for me, and bonus HP for all! Smash enough baddies with the skills I say, and you unlock super buffs(massive speed and healing), plus Healing Factor resets. For some time after, each hit means more HP for the crew and you. Don't mess this up!
Blink, and you'll miss my deadly dash combo. Slash, dash, repeat! Hit someone? You get to go again! (Up to 2 more times. Don't get greedy.) Who says I can't multitask?

Now with bouncy castle action! Slash, bounce, repeat. It's like the world's deadliest pinball!. Cooldowns? Never heard of 'em. Keep going as long as you hit stuff, just don't let me fall flat on my ass!
Try getting to my teammates, I dare you! My dash slash knocks fools down, and if I hit, I get to do it again. Up to three times, baby!
Watch this pro bodyguard in action! I dash forward, nail the bad guy, and bounce in any direction I want. Oh, and I can do this two more times real quick!
Ever seen someone throw their own face? Watch me KO a crowd, then catch my mug on the rebound!. Don't lose your head over it
Juggle my noggin for extra throws! If you catch it thrice, it goes kaboom. Everyone gets a piece of my mind
Out of combat? I'm healing up, staying battle-ready to protect my team. And if I'm about to croak? Surprise! I get a free pass, and my health zooms back up. Nice try, villains
Try getting to my teammates, I dare you! My dash slash knocks fools down, and if I hit, I get to do it again. Up to three times, baby!
Watch this pro bodyguard in action! I dash forward, nail the bad guy, and bounce in any direction I want. Oh, and I can do this two more times real quick!
Yup, I can double jump in midair! During The Big Test and its upgrade, I can also stomp heads and wall jump to reset its cooldown. Stomp enemies so hard they won't get near my team!
Slicey, dicey, twice as nicey! Swing both swords at whoever gets too close. Sushi, anyone?
Now with extra chop! Stabs can go straight for the noggin. Heads up! Do a Bunny Hop and POW! Stabby Stabby action guaranteed! Run while you can!
Protecting my team means my katanas go full savage. No mercy for the baddies!
Relax, you've got Deadpool on your side! Swords out, baddies out. My stab hits crit, and a Healing Hop hit makes the next swing a stabby special
Protecting my team means my katanas go full savage. No mercy for the baddies!
Relax, you've got Deadpool on your side! Swords out, baddies out. My stab hits crit, and a Bad Bunny hit makes the next swing a stabby special
Plushie power! It stops every single attack those chumps throw, giving my team a safety bubble. It's cute AND bulletproof

My ultra-cool, super shiny, extra huggable, and totally blinged-out plushy. Toss it ahead, and it lands as an invincible sphere of awesomeness! Blocking attacks and keeping my team safe inside our furry fortress

Listen up, eyes on the prize, don't wander off! Every time my abilities land on a bad guy, the style points shoot up a notch! When it's full, I can pop my ultimate! With me on the team, you're all staying alive and fabulous!
Hey, you! Yeah, you! Ready for a challenge? Free speed and healing just for trying. Nail enough hits with the right abilities and unlock the deluxe speed-heal package. It's an A+ in chaos!

Don't just stand there, you blockhead! The challenge's still rolling. But don't worry, I'm not one of those money-hungry scam artists. The buffs are on the house, no price hike. Take on this challenge, and you'll get three freebies: a little Speed boost, Continuous Healing, and Damage Up. Hit enough baddies with the right abilities exactly as I ask, and you unlock the ultimate bundle (Super Speed, Super Healing, Damage Boost AND reset all your cooldowns (except Healing Factor; no cheating!). Now THAT'S love

You! Yeah, you - the hyper one! Eyes off my friends. I sentence you to...whatever! Get ready to be taunted. I get bonus HP and healing, and if you whiff your abilities, you take damage, and I get even more HP!

Upgraded courtroom drama! Congrats, unlucky one! You're my pick; enjoy the taunt! I score bonus health and healing, and you take ongoing damage. If you miss an ability while court is in session, it's a double whammy. You get more pain, AND I get more extra HP! Thanks in advance!
Let's play judge! Pick a dumb-dumb and slap a taunt. They miss an ability? Boom! Gavel drops, and I slap them with pain and snark
Dumbpoochu, I choose you! Taunt time! Their HP melts away, and if they whiff an ability, they get bonus pain AND Vulnerability. Double whammy! Objection? Overruled!

You! Yeah, you - the hyper one! Eyes off my friends. I sentence you to...whatever! Get ready to be taunted. I get bonus HP and healing, and if you whiff your abilities, you take damage, and I get even more HP!

Upgraded courtroom drama! Congrats, unlucky one! You're my pick; enjoy the taunt! I score bonus health and healing, and you take ongoing damage. If you miss an ability while court is in session, it's a double whammy. You get more pain, AND I get more extra HP! Thanks in advance!

Wake the #!&% up, hero! We've got a game to win! Speed and healing buffs for starters, bonus Hazardous Hijinks for me, and extra HP for me and my nearby friends. Hit enough baddies with the right abilities exactly as I ask, and you unlock mega speed and healing, plus reset my Healing Factor cooldown!. Team protection mode: activated!

Hey, player! Warm-up's over, time for the main event! Speed, healing, dashes, for me, and bonus HP for all! Smash enough baddies with the skills I say, and you unlock super buffs (massive speed and healing), plus Healing Factor resets. For some time after, each hit means more HP for the crew and you. Don't mess this up!

I'm here to smack baddies, get XP, and shield my friends! When my XP is full, I get to upgrade an ability! Bonus: Score the final hit and force your foe into a selfieâmore XP for me! I'm invincible while striking my best duckface. No photobombs!
Gain Bonus Health when you inflict Bleeding upon an enemy
Activate the heart-shaped generator to expand a spherical shield that blocks incoming damage. Enemies caught within are Slowed

Erupt in primal fury! Gain a massive Movement Speed Boost while unleashing earth-shattering stomps that Launch enemies and applies a Bleed. Thunderous roars also emit sonic waves that Slow enemies hit
Unleash a flurry of continuous bites, converting the damage dealt into Bonus Health. Deals extra damage against Bleeding targets
Unleash a devastating beam of energy that inflicts a Bleed and Slow. Knocks Down airborne targets

The Punisher rides atop Devil Dinosaur, restricting him to only Adjudication/Deliverance and Scourge Grenade while disabling other abilities. While mounted, Devil Dinosaur absorbs a portion of all damage inflicted on The Punisher
Take reduced damage from headshots. Immune to launch-up, knock-back, and other displacement effects. Enemies and allies generate less Ultimate Ability Energy when damaging or healing him
Bite forward. Applies a Bleed that deals continuous Percentage Damage
Dash and pounce on your prey with a vicious bite, applying a Bleed. If the target is already Bleeding, clamp down before hurling them away
Ascend and then enter a brief state of sustained flight
Cast Daggers of Denak forward

Doctor Strange shares his arcane mastery, replacing Scarlet Witch's Chthonian Burst with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction
Separate nearby enemies' Souls from their bodies. Damage dealt to these Souls is transferred to their physical bodies
Release Dark Magic to deal damage to nearby enemies

Invisible Woman enhances Doctor Strange's Maelstrom of Madness with a psionic explosion. The explosion damages and pulls enemies toward Doctor Strange. Based on the explosion's damage, Doctor Strange and nearby allies gain Bonus Health
Open portals between two locations, enabling all units to travel through them
Dark Magic accumulates with every hit on an enemy. If Dark Magic peaks for too long, Doctor Strange will be cursed with Anti-Heal
Create a protective barrier against damage
Run along walls and spring off them to reposition
Daredevil shares the location of his Sonic Pursuit target with The Punisher. At the same time, The Punisher can launch a devil-infused shock grenade to damage and blind enemies
Fire a grappling line that reels Daredevil and his target toward each other. On completion, gain Fury and temporarily enables Cross Interrogation
Expend Fury to unleash Devil's Chain or Devil's Throw. Devil's Chain converts damage into Bonus Health, while Devil's Throw Slows enemies on hit and temporarily enables Cross Interrogation
Swing Billy Clubs forward. Gain Fury on hit
Embrace the Beast within. Enemies in Daredevil's line of sight take damage and suffer a ramping Blind effect. Continually gain Fury while active
Whirl billy clubs in a tight guard to block frontal damage and reflect projectiles, becoming immune to all incoming harm during this stance and gain Fury
Detect enemy movements within a set radius
Cross your Billy Clubs and surge forward. Gain Fury on hit
Locks onto a target, gaining increased Speed; and Damage Reduction when attacked. While in range, dash to the target, Blinding them and restore Fury
Summon the Glartrox to charge forward. The Glartrox can be recalled to charge back toward Elsa. When colliding with terrain or upon return, it bites fiercely, dealing heavy damage

Deadpool hands Jeff the Land Shark a plushie. Jeff can spit it ahead where it'll continuously Taunt nearby enemies and Block Vision, while allies in range are healed! Elsa Bloodstone's Living Bullet changes to special rounds that Taunt targets with Deadpool's chatter, while Slowing, and damaging nearby enemies over time. Elsa can recall the rounds to heal based on damage dealt
Fire your shotgun forward
Dash forward. Your next Double-Barrel Blaster becomes Monster-Piercer
Dealing damage increases hunting Instinct. Defeating enemies caught by Smoky Snare grants additional Instinct. Higher Instinct reduces the cooldown of Helix Advance

Fire a Living Bullet round that splits upon impact, seeking nearby enemies and marking each with a Spectral Sigil. Hitting marked targets with Double-Barrel Blaster or Monster-Piercer grants Elsa a brief Speed boost. Living Bullets deal extra damage to shields and enemies with Bonus Health
Unleash your elephant gun forward. Bullets pierce enemies and deal high damage

Dash forward, gaining Bonus Health and launching enemies hit. Follow up with a Double-Barrel Blaster shot that propels you backward and Slows enemies. Using either stage empowers your next Double-Barrel Blaster, transforming it into Monster-Piercer

Launch a trap containing the monster Diablo. Once deployed, it becomes Invisible and Invulnerable. When an enemy triggers it, Diablo Immobilizes and Damages them. Use to dash to the trapped enemy. Enemies can destroy Diablo to break free
In Diamond Form, lunge forward to grab an enemy, then execute a back slam to inflict damage
In Diamond Form, unleash a flying kick forward and knock back enemies; extra damage is dealt if they're propelled into a wall
Activate Diamond Form to transform your attack style while gaining Damage Reduction and becoming Unstoppable
In Diamond Form, deliver a crushing double-fisted strike to enemies

Luna Snow grants Winter's Chill to Iron Fist and Emma Frost. When Iron Fist activates Harmony Recovery, he can heal nearby allies with Lunar Chi. Emma Frost can project ice energy forward, dealing damage and slowing enemies. She can also enhance her diamond form, condensing frost into an Absolute Zero Diamond barrier that blocks enemy attacks and movement
Create a levitating barrier at the designated location

Project a forward psychic assault that stuns foes and prevents them from unleashing their Ultimate Abilities; if the effect lingers, it gradually commandeers their mind, forcing them to move toward Emma Frost

Seize control of an enemy's sentienceâdamage dealt to the sentience cascades to the physical form and can be pierced by Telepathic Pulse. When the sentience shatters, it unleashes extra damage on its owner
Fire a psionic beam to deal damage; the longer the beam hits, the higher the damage
Wooden walls near Groot will Awaken, activating an extra effect. Right-click while building a wooden wall to continue building additional walls
Perform a combo with his arms, and the third strike will slightly Launch Up the hit enemy airborne
Target a location and grow an Ironwood Wall. When the wall is Awakened, damage dealt by Groot and nearby allies grants Groot Bonus Health. Groot gains Unstoppable while near Ironwood Walls
Throw an explosive Spore Bomb that splits into multiple small explosive spores
Fire a massive vine cluster that pulls nearby enemies to its center and Imprisons them
Target a location and grow a Thornlash Wall. When Awakened, it strikes nearby enemies attacked by Groot and his allies
Launch vines to attack enemies

Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Flower Wall, which, when in Flora Colossus state, restores health to random nearby allies and grants them Damage Reduction. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within Regeneration Domain a Damage Boost

Gambit charges Magneto's greatsword with kinetic energy. When Magneto activates this ability, Iron Volley is replaced with Ace Greatsword, which detonates upon striking enemies. The explosion leaves residual kinetic energy within the target, inflicting secondary damage after a brief delay
Channel kinetic energy into the bo staff, then slam it into the ground after a sweeping strike, creating a shockwave that damages nearby enemies and heals allies
While Breaking Spades deck is active, trigger Raise Empowerment to scattering cards in an arc in all directions. Explosions damage enemies and Launch them up
Conjure a Spade card by consuming one stack of  Sleight of Hand to gain Damage Boost and switch to the Breaking Spades deck
While Healing Hearts deck is active, trigger Flush Empowerment to card spring and fire a full deck forward. Cards bounce between allies on impact, granting Health and a Healing Boost
Side-step forward with bo staff in hand, dashing a short distance
While Breaking Spades deck is active, trigger Flush Empowerment to fire a full set of cards forward. Cards explode on impact, dealing damage while inflicting Reduced Healing
Conjure a Heart card by consuming one stack of  Sleight of Hand to Heal and switch to the Healing Hearts deck
Launch three kinetic-charged cards in an arc ahead. Each card detonates on impact, creating a single-target explosion that damages enemies and heals allies
While Healing Hearts deck is active, trigger Raise Empowerment to launch a cluster of cards in an arc ahead. Explosions heal nearby allies and Purify them

Lock onto an ally within sight and unleash multiple Aces that heal and Purify. Both enter the Kinetic Transfer state, granting increased Movement Speed and Jump Boost, while enhancing attacks with additional single-target explosive damage and providing the ally with Ultimate Ability Charge Acceleration
Aim at an enemy to improve focus, enhancing the damage inflicted by Piercing Arrow
Shoot three explosive arrows
Unsheathe a katana and slash forward, launching up enemies hit
Capture Afterimages of enemies in his view. Damage dealt to an Afterimage is transferred to the corresponding enemy
Shoot a Hypersonic Arrow, dealing two instances of damage to enemies in its path and inflicting them with Slow. This ability can Knock Down flying heroes

Cloak & Dagger inject light and dark energy into Hawkeye's katana. When Hawkeye uses Crescent Slash, enemies hit are launched back, and a blade wave filled with light and energy sweeps forward. This wave passes through both allies and enemies: it heals and boosts healing for allies, while damaging enemies and applying Vulnerability
Shoot a powerful arrow
Swing a wakizashi to strike frontal enemies, deflecting all incoming projectiles
Perform a double jump in the direction of movement
Transform into a Nastrond Crow to glide forth, press again to undo the transformation. Gain Bonus Health when the transformation ends

Hela channels energy of the undead to empower Namor. When Namor strikes with his trident, a spectral water column erupts at the target area, slowing enemies hit. Whenever Hela or Namor assist in a KO, an invulnerable Undead Monstro spawns at the fallen enemy's position, automatically attacking the nearest foe for a short time before vanishing
Soar into the sky and unleash Nastrond Crows from each hand at will

Venom shares his symbiotes with Jeff and Hela.  Hela's Hel Tendrils unleash a symbiotic Hel Sphere. Upon hit, it pulls nearby enemies toward the impact point and links them, slowing enemies that try to escape.
Hold Space to fall slowly
Defeating an enemy will generate a Nastrond Crow, exploding after a duration
Throw Nightsword thorns
Fire multiple Nightsword thorns that detonate after a delay
Project an explosive Hel sphere to Stun nearby enemies.

Hulk charges Iron Man and Namor with gamma radiation. When Iron Man uses Armor Overdrive, he will initiate a gamma upgrade. When Namor receives the radiation, he will summon an extra Gamma Monstro which will continuously fire gamma rays at locked-on enemies. The longer the rays hit, the higher the damage
Emit gamma-ray bursts to inflict damage. Reduce Indestructible Guard cooldown upon hit
Wolverine, Hulk can interact with each other. Once both parties confirm, Hulk can lift Wolverine and press the key to hurl him forward
Launch a Gamma Grenade to inflict damage and Launch Up enemies
Fire with a Gamma Ray Gun
Unleash stored gamma energy, transforming from Hero Hulk into Monster Hulk for a limited time period
Swing fists forward to punch enemies
HOLD Space to perform a charged leap that allows Hero Hulk to Knock a flying enemy to the ground
Generate gamma shields for Hero Hulk and nearby allies, absorbing and converting damage into energy for HULK SMASH
Transform from Bruce Banner into Hero Hulk
Emit gamma energy to irradiate enemies and render them immobilize and immune to all ability effects. Using Heavy Blow or Gamma Burst will prematurely remove this status
Grab and smash the enemy in front
Launch a fireball to create a Flame Field at the targeted area
Launch forward a splittable fireball
Dive towards the ground, dealing damage to enemies and detonating any Flame Fields hit
Enter a state of accelerated ascent
Form a fire wall between Fire Fields to burn enemies

Human Torch stores Pyrokinetic Energy in Spider-Man's suit, enabling him to unleash an Inferno Blast that sprays a fiery web while performing a backflip to create distance. The flames damage enemies and apply a Burn-Tracer. Detonating these Burn-Tracers inflicts Damage Over Time

The Invisible Woman taps into her powers, channeling Psionic Might to fortify the entire Fantastic Four team, granting damage resistance. Once activated, they can continually generate Bonus Health, making up for lost Health
Explode with cosmic fire to deal damage to enemies within range. Upon skill activation, all Flame Fields will transform into Flame Tornadoes, dealing extra damage
Human Torch can lift The Thing into the air and slam him down, dealing damage, launching enemies, and creating a zone that disables mobility abilities
Enter Invisible state some time after disengaging from combat and grant yourself Healing Over Time

The Invisible Woman taps into her powers, channeling Psionic Might to fortify Mr.Fantastic. This formidable force bolsters Mr.Fantastic, granting damage resistance. Once activated, they can continually generate Bonus Health, making up for lost Health
Manipulate psionic energy to push or pull enemies in front of her
Generate a force shield in front of a selected ally or in front of you. The shield can block damage and provide Healing Over Time to nearby allies. Enemies that pass through the shield are slowed
Manifest an unseen force field within a chosen area, rendering allies inside undetectable by enemies and provide Healing Over Time. Enemies that pass through the field are slowed
Launch a force field orbs that can pierce heroes, flying to maximum distance before returning to Invisible Woman; damaging enemies and healing teammates
Gather psionic energy and then cast it, upon impact or pressing the Ability key again, it erupts into a psionic vortex, continuously drawing in enemies and causing damage
Generate a force field at your feet, stepping on it propels her into the Invisible state
Assists in taking down enemies allow him to absorb their Chi and gain Bonus Health
Perform up to three consecutive jumps while airborne
Assume a defensive stance with a boost of Chi to block incoming attacks and gain Damage Reduction, then strike back with Yat Jee Chung Kuen
Cross legs and channel Chi, slowly gaining Bonus Health
Strike the targeted enemy with Jeet Kune Do, reducing the cooldown of Block and Strike with every hit
Dash forward, delivering a flying kick when hitting an enemy or reaching full range, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Damage increases with lower enemy health
Become living Chi to boost his speed, damage, and attack range, delivering stronger punches while reducing the cooldown of Dragon's Defense
Luna Snow grants Winter's Chill to Hawkeye and Iron Fist. When Iron Fist activates Harmony Recovery, he can heal nearby allies with Lunar Chi
Run horizontally along the walls
Dash forward to pursue the targeted enemy and unleash a flurry of attacks
Activate Armor Overdrive state, enhancing the damage of Repulsor Blast and Unibeam
Activate Hyper-Velocity state for swift forward flight
Activate Hyper-Velocity state for swift forward flight
Fire a devastating pulse cannon in the targeted direction, delivering catastrophic damage to the targeted area upon impact
When Hyper-Velocity or Armor Overdrive is used, Iron Man can launch a missile bombardment
When Hyper-Velocity or Armor Overdrive is used, Iron Man can launch a missile bombardment

When Iron Man, Ultron and Squirrel Girl team up, Ultron's Encephalo-Ray upgrades to Nano-Ray, firing a beam that pierces through all characters, dealing continuous damage to foes while healing allies; Squirrel Girl gains the Squirrel Missile ability. She directs a squirrel to ride Iron Man's nanotech glove as a homing missile. Upon hit, the squirrel flees just before a fiery explosion!
Fire nano pulse cannons forward
Fire nano pulse cannons forward
Fire nano pulse cannons forward
Fire nano pulse cannons forward
Launch a high-speed water sphere that bursts upon impact, dealing damage to enemies within range

Venom shares his symbiotes with Jeff and Hela. Jeff's Guardian of the Deep links with nearby allies, providing continuous healing. When the effect ends, it releases a powerful healing burst, converting any excess into Bonus Health.
Spit a bubble that heals the ally who collects it, granting them Healing Boost and Movement Boost while also launching up nearby enemies
Dive into the scene with only his dorsal fin exposed, granting himself a Movement Boost. Jeff can heal while submerged and gains the wall-crawl ability

When Storm activates Omega Hurricane and Jeff the Land Shark's It's Jeff is ready, they can unleash a powerful Team-Up Ability. During this period, Storm's Omega Hurricane merges with Jeff to form a Jeff-nado
Deep dive into the scene and resurface to swallow both enemies and allies within range, activating Hide and Seek for a brief duration before ejecting the swallowed heroes forward
Jeff the Land Shark and Rocket Raccoon can ride on Groot's shoulders, receiving Damage Reduction
Unleash a healing splash
Jeff the Land Shark and Rocket Raccoon can ride on Groot's shoulders, receiving Damage Reduction
Reduce damage taken from critical hits
Pull out a dagger to stab enemies, dealing extra damage when attacking an enemy from behind
Become Invisible and conjure an Illusion to deceive enemies

Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Flower Wall, which, when in Flora Colossus state, restores health to random nearby allies and grants them Damage Reduction. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within Regeneration Domain a Damage Boost
Swap with the selected Illusion
Project an Illusion that can cast some of Loki's abilities
Shapeshift into a targeted ally or enemy hero and use all their abilities except any of their Team-Up Abilities
Fire Mystical Missiles to heal allies or deal damage to enemies. Direct hits on allies provide extra healing
Use Rune Stones to create a magical field that provides allies Healing and converts incoming damage into further healing
Cast a clump of ice to Freeze the hit enemy and restore Health
Automatically restore Health when casting Ice Arts or Absolute Zero
Take center stage and start dancing! Press to toggle between two performances: Heal allies or grant them Damage Boost

Luna Snow grants Winter's Chill to Iron Fist and Emma Frost. When Iron Fist activates Harmony Recovery, he can heal nearby allies with Lunar Chi. Emma Frost can project ice energy forward, dealing damage and slowing enemies. She can also enhance her diamond form, condensing frost into an Absolute Zero Diamond barrier that blocks enemy attacks and movement
Fire ice shards for a short duration, damaging enemies or healing allies while restoring her own Health
Fire ice shots that damage enemies or heal allies
Boost Damage and Healing. Gain extra healing when healing others
White Fox grants Luna Snow a spirit fox for protection. Luna can activate it for a burst of speed and fire it forward, healing allies in its path while applying Charm to enemies
Attach Idol Aura to an ally. Allies with Idol Aura also restore Health when Luna Snow is healing others
Keep moving forward to start ice skating and enable higher jumps

Doctor Strange shares his arcane mastery with Scarlet Witch and Magik. Scarlet Witch's Chthonian Burst is replaced with Mystic Burst upon activation. Hold down the attack button to unleash a rapid, relentless salvo of magical missiles in the target direction. Magik can unleash a Chain of Cyttorak that links two enemies and slows them; the farther they are apart, the greater the Slow effect inflicted during the link
Transform into Darkchild, gaining enhancements to all her abilities
Summon a Limbo demon that attacks enemies after exiting a Stepping Disc
Spin while swinging the Soulsword after exiting a Stepping Disc
Convert damage inflicted on enemies into Bonus Health to herself
Strike forward an air slash
Slash forward with the Soulsword
Jump through a Stepping Disc, teleporting a short distance in the direction of movement. Become Invincible while teleporting
Dash forward and launch up enemies
Conjure an iron shield around himself. Damage taken will transform into rings on Magneto's back
Fire a volley of magnetic orbs forward. The range of the resulting explosion increases based on distance flown
Convert the iron rings on Magneto's back into a Mag-Cannon and launch a metallic mass forward. Higher stacks of rings increase damage, and full stacks knock back enemies
Hold Space to fall slowly
Conjure a metal shield around a chosen ally. Damage taken will transform into rings on Magneto's back
Change the magnetic field around to form a metallic curtain, blocking all incoming projectiles
Draw in all materials around to forge an iron meteor that deals massive damage upon impact. Absorbing enemy projectiles can enhance the meteor's power, yet overloading will cause it to self-destruct

Gambit charges Magneto's greatsword with kinetic energy. When Magneto activates this ability, Iron Volley is replaced with Ace Greatsword, which detonates upon striking enemies. The explosion leaves residual kinetic energy within the target, inflicting secondary damage after a brief delay
Consume Life Orbs to grant allies a Damage Boost
Consume Life Orbs to grant allies Healing Over Time

Mantis enhances Groot's wooden walls and Loki's Rune Stones with life energy. Groot can additionally unleash a Flower Wall, which, when in Flora Colossus state, restores health to random nearby allies and grants them Damage Reduction. Loki's Rune Stones grant allies within Regeneration Domain a Damage Boost
Fire an energy thorn and regain one Life Orb after a critical hit.
Consume Life Orbs to grant herself a Damage Boost
Receive a Movement Boost when not injured and Healing Over Time when consuming Life Orbs
Release energy around her while moving, providing Healing Over Time and Movement Boosts for surrounding allies. Excess healing converts to Bonus Health
Throw a spore to Sedate the nearest enemy
Leap upward and smash the ground, slowing enemies within range. Mister Fantastic can leap again upon landing a hit

Extend arms forward to entangle an enemy, then press Primary Attack to pull the hit enemy toward him, or select and yank another enemy, Knocking Them Airborne against each other. Hit targets are Immobilized

Using abilities generates Elasticity, boosting attack power. Reaching full Elasticity triggers an Inflated state that increases Maximum Health, further boosts damage, and enables the use of Reflexive Rubber

Rocket Raccoon upgrades his B.R.B. for Star-Lord and Mister Fantastic. Star-Lord gets an Astral Jump device, allowing him to teleport to its deployment point from anywhere on the map. Mister Fantastic receives a Fantastic Amplifier, removing his Elasticity limit and letting him actively enter Inflation state
Gain a Shield, select a target and dash towards them, dealing damage to enemies or granting a Shield to allies
Stretch the body to absorb damage before launching stored damage in the targeted direction
Stretch out a forward punch to attack enemies
Fire an Ankh to launch up enemies within its radius towards the center
Unleash Crescent Darts forward that can bounce between enemies and Ankhs, dealing damage to enemies
Open a portal that allows Khonshu to bombard enemies with his talons

Blessed by Khonshu, Blade gains a new ability. When activated, Blade swings his Ancestral Sword in a powerful slash, dashing forward a short distance. At the end of the dash, he swiftly slashes four times, each strike sending a Darkmoon Blade forward. When a Darkmoon Blade hits an enemy, it bounces to nearby targets
Launch forward a Moon Blade that can bounce between enemies and Ankhs, dealing damage to enemies
Launch a frontal grappling hook that pulls Moon Knight towards it
Hold SHIFT to glide
Perform a double jump
Perform a combo with his truncheon, and the third strike will launch up the enemy hit slightly
Summon a Monstro Spawn that can autonomously attack enemies
Summon a protective barrier while flying upwards
Summon Giganto to leap atop enemies within range, disabling their mobility abilities

Hela channels energy of the undead to empower Namor. When Namor strikes with his trident, a spectral water column erupts at the target area, slowing enemies hit. Whenever Hela or Namor assist in a KO, an invulnerable Undead Monstro spawns at the fallen enemy's position, automatically attacking the nearest foe for a short time before vanishing
Throw the trident forward, reducing Aquatic Dominion's cooldown upon enemy impact. Critical hits cause Monstro Spawn to enter a berserk state, gaining increased Attack Speed

Launch the trident forward to damage nearby enemies, then direct all Monstro Spawn to perform an enhanced attack on the nearest hit enemy. When the trident hits an enemy, Monstro Spawn to enter a berserk state, gaining increased Attack Speed

Enhanced by Rocket Raccoon, Peni Parkerâs Bionic Spider-Nest regularly generates strengthened armor packs. Each armor pack grants bonus health to the hero who picks up the pack. Peni Parker can deploy Bionic Spider-Nest and Armored Spider-Nest at the same time
Deploy Arachno-Mines that can be concealed within the confines of a Cyber-Web

Generate a Bionic Spider-Nest at a targeted area, periodically spawning Spider-Drones and creating Cyber-Webs. While in the Cyber-Web, Peni and allies gain Healing Over Time and a Movement Boost. Excess healing converts into Bonus Health. Spider-Drones inflict a Slow effect on hit, which can stack and refresh its effect period with multiple hits
Shoot a web strand that links to the targeted area or Cyber-Web. If stretched too far, it will trigger a pullback

Peni Parker whips up a Sticky Bomb for Spider-Man! Prime it, then toss it before the timer's up for a blast that damages nearby enemies and attaches a Spider-Tracer to them. If not thrown in time, it explodes on Spider-Man, recharging a Web-Cluster shot and granting Bonus Health
Launch forward a Cyber-Web Cluster
Cast futuristic webbing that Immobilizes enemies or creates a Cyber-Web. While in the Cyber-Web, Peni and allies gain Healing Over Time and a Movement Boost. Excess healing converts into Bonus Health

Launch a fiery projectile forward, applying 1 Spark to enemies hit. Critical hits apply 2 Sparks. At 3 Sparks, Phoenix triggers a fiery explosion that applies 1 Spark to enemies around and Healing Over Time to self. Sparks from explosions will not stack within a brief period
Merge with the Phoenix, entering a state of free flight. Gain a Movement Boost

Soar into the sky with the Phoenix and crash down onto a selected area, dealing devastating damage to enemies while creating a shockwave that destroys enemy summons, shields, and any Bonus Health. Enemies hit are applied with 1 Spark

Mark a targeted area with psionic energy, followed by a series of fiery explosions. The first blast Stuns enemies, while the subsequent two explosions inflict Slow. Applies 1 Spark to enemies hit
Leave behind an illusion and instantly teleport in the desired direction, followed by detonating the illusion. Enemies hit are applied with 1 Spark
Slash nearby enemies with a psionic katana, dealing massive damage

Unleash bolts with psionic crossbows to damage enemies and reduce the cooldowns of all her abilities

Launch a volley of psionic shurikens that stick to enemies, dealing damage and granting herself Bonus Health. Press again to recall the shurikens

Jump toward an ally and apply damage reduction to yourself and allies within the landing area
Human Torch can lift The Thing into the air and slam him down, dealing damage, launching enemies, and creating a zone that disables mobility abilities

Hulk charges Black Panther and The Thing with gamma radiation. When Black Panther's health is low, he gains a gamma shield, becoming Unstoppable and blocking attacks. The Thing gains Gamma Gauntlets, boosting Damage and range of his Rocky Jab and Stone Haymaker. Dealing damage with these attacks grants Bonus Health, and maximum Bonus Health cap is increased
Rapidly punch forward

Angela shares fragments of her Ichors with Thor, empowering him to hurl a Thunder Spear that restores Thorforce for each enemy struck. Afterward, Thor can leap to the spear's explosion point, dealing a second wave of damage to all enemies within range
Consume Thorforce to gain Bonus Health. Landing Mjolnir Bash on an enemy instantly recharges Thorforce
Fly quickly in the direction of movement and then enter an Accelerated state

Deploy drones to an ally marked by Imperative: Patch, granting them increased Speed and Damage. Additionally, all allies within range of you and the chosen teammate receive Bonus Health.
Command up to 2 giant drones to follow 2 allies, constantly healing allies within its radius, with more healing for the designated allies.

When Iron Man, Ultron and Squirrel Girl team up, Ultron's Encephalo-Ray upgrades to Nano-Ray, firing a beam that pierces through all characters, dealing continuous damage to foes while healing allies; Squirrel Girl gains the Squirrel Missile ability. Burrow underground for free movement. After a duration or by left-clicking, devour enemies above to deal damage based on the enemy's current health and generate equivalent Bonus Health. Devoured enemies suffer Reduced Healing
Dash to the target location from a certain height. Upon landing, damage nearby enemies, launching them up toward the landing point

Venom shares his symbiotes with Jeff and Hela. Jeff's Guardian of the Deep links with nearby allies, providing continuous healing. When the effect ends, it releases a powerful healing burst, converting any excess into Bonus Health. Hela's Hel Tendrils unleash a symbiotic Hel Sphere. Generate Bonus Health against damage. The lower Venom's Health, the greater the Bonus Health generated

Enter Awakened state, transforming Spirit Tails into physical tails. While active, continuously drain Spirit Tail energy and heal nearby allies. Striking enemies provides additional area healing
Manifest the full Nine-Tailed Fox form and continuously heal nearby allies. Cannot receive healing effects from others while in this form

Black Cat shares her luck with her allies. When White Fox embraces her newfound fortune, she unleashestracking Spirit Tails to grant Healing and Speed to allies, while damaging and Slowing foes. When Captain America enjoys his luck, his shield's block radius expands and allows him to aim deflectedProjectiles directly toward his target
In Kumiho Form, slam the ground, causing an explosive shockwave. Hitting enemies or summons grants One-Time Healing to self and nearby allies
While Awakened, dash forward. Hit an enemy to slow them, enabling a second dash that knocks back enemies
Consume one Spirit Tail to send a spectral fox forward. It heals and grants invulnerability to allies it passes through, damages and Charms enemies, forcing foes to move toward White Fox

Teleport to a chosen ally, instantly healing allies in the area while generating a shield

Fire a Fox Marble forward that bounces off terrain or heroes, then homes in on nearby heroes. It damages enemies, heals allies, and restores Spirit Tail energy
Charge up and launch a hook with his bionic arm, reeling in the first target hit and enemies lurking behind

Leap high, then dash forward and slam down with the bionic arm, dealing damage to enemies in range, marking them for Culling. Marked enemies will perish instantly if their health falls below a certain threshold, recharging the bionic arm for another Kraken Impact within a short period
Fire explosive rounds with his blaster, Roterstern, damaging the target hit and enemies behind them.

Inspired by Captain America's resolve, Winter Soldier can leap to the aid of a designated ally, slamming the ground with his mechanical arm to damage nearby foes and grant Bonus Health to allies within range. Captain America and Winter Soldier can interact with each other once both parties confirm. The duo then collides and unleashes a shockwave that damages and slows enemies
Charge up and launch a powerful electrical punch with the bionic arm in the target direction, dealing damage to enemies within range and Slowing them. This ability can Knock Down flying heroes
Dash forward, seizing enemies along the path and launching up enemies at the end of the dash
Rage builds when Wolverine attacks or takes hits, boosting the damage of his Claw Strikes and the Bonus Health from his regenerative healing factor
Leap like an animal to snatch the first enemy upon impact and Smash them to the ground. Unleashing this ability will enhance his normal attack to Berserk Claw Strike for a brief period

Cyclops supercharges Wolverine's claws, extending his attack range. While active, Wolverine's Vicious Rampage is replaced with Kinetic Claws, granting him a brief forward lunge that unleashes a flurry of slashes around him
Knock enemies ahead airborne and spiral through the air, sweeping up enemies along the path and delivering a devastating impact at the landing point

Wolverine and Hulk can interact with each other. Once both parties confirm, Hulk can lift Wolverine and press the key to hurl him forwardJean Grey imbues Wolverine with the awe-inspiring Phoenix Force. In this state, Wolverine's abilities gain Lifesteal when inflicting damage

Begin to heal and rise with a hefty Bonus Health, shaking off all debuffs. After a brief moment, any remaining Bonus Health morphs into a one-off heal, zeroing out his Rage. Assists in KOs reduce this cooldown
Slash with Adamantium claws for a Claw Strike. Unleashing Feral Leap will enhance it to Berserk Claw Strike for a brief period
